Class ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<S>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<S>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode, ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionBlockStartNode, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBlockContract, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchCondition, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessJoin, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopInvariant, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessOperationContract, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStart, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStatement, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessTermination
Enclosing class:
ExecutionNodeReader
public abstract static class ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement> extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement implements IExecutionNode<S>
An abstract implementation of IExecutionNode which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface IExecutionNode

    INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_END, INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_START

    Returns all code blocks completed by this IExecutionBlockStartNode.

    getConstraints()
    Returns all available IExecutionConstraints.
    ISymbolicLayout
    getCurrentLayout(int configurationIndex)
    Returns the current memory layout which shows the memory structure before the current node in the symbolic execution tree is executed.
    String
    getFormatedBlockCompletionCondition(IExecutionBlockStartNode<?> completedNode)
    Returns the human readable condition under which this node completes the code block of the given IExecutionBlockStartNode.
    String
    getFormatedPathCondition()
    Returns the human readable path condition to reach this node as string.
    IExecutionLink

    Returns the incoming IExecutionLink.
    ImmutableList<IExecutionLink>

    Returns all available incoming links.
    ISymbolicLayout

    Returns the initial memory layout before the method was executed.
    int
    getLayoutsCount()
    Returns the number of memory layouts.
    ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass>
    getLayoutsEquivalenceClasses(int configurationIndex)
    Returns the equivalence classes of the memory layout with the given index.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode

      protected AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode(IExecutionNode<?> parent, String name, String formatedPathCondition, boolean pathConditionChanged)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent IExecutionNode.
      name - The name of this node.
      formatedPathCondition - The formated path condition.
      pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?

      Returns the parent IExecutionNode or null if the current node is the root.

    • isPathConditionChanged

      public boolean isPathConditionChanged()
      Checks if this node has changed the path condition of the parent.
      Specified by:
      isPathConditionChanged in interface IExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>
      Returns:
      true has different path condition compared to its parent, false has same path condition as parent.
